name: Delfeayo Marsalis
abstract: Delfeayo Ferdinand Marsalis (; born July 28, 1965) is an American jazz trombonist, record producer and educator.

interviews.title: Delfeayo Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: The Dizzy Gillespie United Nation Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Jackson
about_quotes.evidence: I represented Colorado, me and another person, and Delfayo Marsalis represented Louisiana. Well when I met him... I gave him my phone number... he comes to Denver with Wynton Marsalis... he came over to the house and he listened, we hung out
